## What this changes

Brief description of the change and why.

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (`pytest -q`) and I added tests for new behavior.
- [ ] I did not commit any real MISP key, hostname, or other secret.
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or settings changed (README / ONBOARDING / DEPLOY / CLOUD).
- [ ] Write-path changes keep the guardrails (safelist, rate limit, verified submitter, explicit `to_ids`).
- [ ] Version bumped with `scripts/bump_version.py` if this is a release.
